entities.description: vdd 4v0 som input is a power supply input for the core board  serving as the main power source
12w is a power rating suggested for the power supply design

relations.description: vdd 4v0 som input is the main power input for the core board  and the power supply design is referenced from the evaluation board
the power supply design for vdd 4v0 som input is suggested to be no more than 12w
